<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123, Relates to #124 -->

## Tasks completed

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Renderer / rendering-pipeline change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run quality` passes locally (typecheck, lint, format, build, unit + integration tests)
- [ ] Tests were written first and failed before implementation (TDD by behavior)
- [ ] No skips, ignores, or bypasses (`.skip`, `@ts-ignore`, `biome-ignore`, `continue-on-error`)
- [ ] Updated `README.md` / docs if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Branch and commits follow the [contributing conventions](CONTRIBUTING.md)
